verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know Jesus is the Father, I know Jesus is the Son, I know Jesus is the Holy Ghost, And all this three are one.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let me tell you who Jesus is, He’s the Rock of all Ages, He’s the Alpha and the Omega, He’s the Everlasting Father.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He’s the beginning and the end Much more than He’s my Friend He’s the Son of Man He’s coming back again.
